21:105:10.m: he inherits it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

21:105:11.m: my servants (who will inherit the earth)

21:106:3.m: this one (points to something specific in this ayah)

هٰذَا: this one (points to something specific in this ayah)

21:107:2.m: we sent you (object of وَمَآ - and not)

21:107:5.m: for the worlds/all creation (object of رَحْمَةً)

21:108:5.m: indeed only/just (introduces what يُوحَىٰٓ is revealed)

21:108:8.m: one, single (describing إِلٰهٌ 'god' in this ayah)

21:108:11.m: those who submit/surrender (to Allah) (answering: فَهَلْ أَنتُم - 'then are you?')

21:109:2.m: they turned themselves away (from the truth)

21:109:11.m: far away (referring to something not specified yet)

21:110:1.m: indeed he/it (subject of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)

21:110:2.m: he knows (what is said openly in ٱلْجَهْرَ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ)

21:110:3.m: the open speech (object of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)

21:110:5.m: the speech (object of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)

21:110:6.m: and he knows (connected to يَعْلَمُ in previous ayah)

21:111:1.m: and if/whether (introduces uncertainty about أَدْرِى/I know)

21:111:2.m: I know (in response to وَإِنْ - and if)

21:111:3.m: perhaps he/it (referring to what was mentioned)

21:111:8.m: a time, a period (after إِلَىٰ meaning 'until')

21:112:6.m: The Most Merciful (as a divine name of Allah)

رَّحْمٰنُ: Most Merciful (as a divine name of Allah)

21:112:7.m: The One whose help is sought
